page_metadata.biotools__summary: The package is a unified implementation of MeSH.db, MeSH.AOR.db, and MeSH.PCR.db and also is interfaced to construct Gene-MeSH package (MeSH.XXX.eg.db). loadMeSHDbiPkg import sqlite file and generate MeSH.XXX.eg.db.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The package is a unified implementation of MeSH.db, MeSH.AOR.db, and MeSH.PCR.db and also is interfaced to construct Gene-MeSH package (MeSH.XXX.eg.db). loadMeSHDbiPkg import sqlite file and generate MeSH.XXX.eg.db.
